title: Repository Purpose, Risk Profile, and Definition of Done · Gate Lens: Repo Purpose
summary: Design quality gates for a new repository according to its actual failure costs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates repo purpose increment in a repository engineering contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define users, runtime, data sensitivity, deployment, ownership, and expected lifetime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
